arts.ttl: Mo Salah’s true colours clear for all to see with Federico Chiesa interaction at Liverpool training
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah has been in sensational form for Liverpool this season, and the Egyptian forward has shown his generosity by offering to cook for new teammate Federico Chiesa

arts.ttl: Liverpool now in the mix for 23-year-old Torino star – Becoming one of most wanted
arts.sum: Liverpool have become the latest club to join the chase for Torino star Samuele Ricci. The midfielder has starred for the Serie A side and his fine displays this season have seen several clubs take notice. La Stampa, relayed by L’interista, state Liverpool are added to the growing list of interested clubs. arts.ttl: Chelsea vs. Brentford: Cole Palmer bidding to emulate Mohamed Salah Premier League feat
arts.sum: Cole Palmer will be bidding to emulate a feat last achieved by Mohamed Salah when Chelsea play host to Brentford in the Premier League on Sunday evening.

arts.ttl: Why Liverpool vs Fulham is not on TV explained as Premier League broadcast blocked
arts.sum: Liverpool FC continue their Premier League title charge against Fulham at Anfield on Saturday afternoon.

arts.ttl: Mo Salah shows true colours during training ground interaction with Federico Chiesa
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah gave Liverpool fans a glimpse of his kind and caring character during a recent interaction with Federico Chiesa at the AXA Training Centre - showing just how genuine the star is

They are leading both the Premier League and the Champions League standings and it appears like no team can stop them at the moment. arts.ttl: Exclusive: Adidas to Release Liverpool US Shirt
arts.sum: Footy Headlines can exclusively leak that Adidas will launch a special US kit for Liverpool with a design inspired by baseball jerseys.
